name: AHG Marketplace Plugin
description: Online art/gallery marketplace with multi-GLAM sector support. Fixed pricing, make-an-offer negotiations, and timed auctions. Multi-currency, seller verification, commission tracking, and payout management.
author: The Archive and Heritage Group

features.fixed_price: Direct buy-now pricing with cart integration
features.auctions: English, sealed-bid, and Dutch auctions with anti-sniping
features.multi_currency: ZAR, USD, EUR, GBP, AUD with exchange rates
features.commission_tracking: Configurable platform commission with per-seller overrides
features.payout_management: Bank transfer, PayPal, PayFast, Stripe Connect payouts
